description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: Build and Test. Use the rikorose/gcc-cmake Docker image for a job named build that runs `cmake .` then `make`, caches the path cmake-build-debug/, and publishes the generated `moth-server` directory as an artifact. Add a job named run_test in the Test stage using the ubuntu image, with a before_script that sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive and installs curl via `apt-get update && apt-get -y install curl`, declares a dependency on the build job, and executes `./test/gitlab-test.sh`. No special rules, only/except clauses, or deployment targets are required.
